name: Farfalle with Salmon Sauce

ingredients.item: smoked salmon, cut into thin strips

method: Cook pasta according to package directions; drain and set aside.
Cook lemon juice and wine to reduce; lower heat and add cream. Cook, stirring constantly, until sauce thickens,
about 10 minutes. Add salt, pepper, dill and salmon; heat. Ladle sauce over pasta and serve.
Pasta with Asparagus and Shrimp is a delicious and healthy dish that's quick to cook. One of the most popular
dishes from Italy, this pasta sauce is rich in garlic, olive oil, and lemon. It provides a lot of different flavors in one
dish. The shrimp and asparagus, along with the lemon zest, provide depth to the sauce, while the black olives add a
salty pop that makes this dish truly satisfying without any other palate-bothering ingredients.
